§6Leviathan Steam Turbine§f processes §bmassive amounts of Steam§f for power generation.

§ePower Class:§f
§aFar more powerful than Industrial Steam Turbines§f - the ultimate turbine.

§eCapability:§f
• Only limited by fluid transfer rates
• Handles enormous steam throughput
• Maximum power extraction

§eUse Cases:§f
• Fusion Reactor steam output
• Multiple large boilers
• Industrial-scale power generation

§aTip:§f The final turbine upgrade - handles anything you can feed it.
